DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS DEFENDANT SBC ADVERTISING LP'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is overruled as to all causes of action of the Cross Complaint. There are sufficient facts and/or failure to sustain burden. No authority to support arguments. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/REQ/pm) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR # 2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-16-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-28-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 622

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MATTHEW MOSCHETTI'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS MADE A GENERAL APPEARANCE. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/pm) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MATTHEW MOSCHETTI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
